name: The Mustard Seed
oracleText: At the beginning of your end step, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. If that creature has three or more +1/+1 counters on it, create a 4/4 green Treefolk creature token with reach.
flavorText: "Which indeed is the least of all seeds." — Matthew 13:32
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Jan Luyken's "Parable of the Mustard Seed" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain underlying etching; Commons notes the Bowyer Bible reproduction is released under FAL.
classics.creditText: Jan Luyken, Parable of the Mustard Seed
